extraction.one_line_summary: BAIS Davide won from a four-man breakaway given the stage at Campo Imperatore after the peloton showed zero interest in defending.
tactical_patterns: DSM completely surrendered mountain points jersey rather than chase, prioritizing maglia rosa defense over secondary classification control.
Four-man break established inside 10km on 219km mountain stage signals peloton's pre-negotiated truce before serious GC battles begin.

rider_signals.YENNESON Andreas: neutral: Held pink for fourth day without testing, marking time before harder summit finishes
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: neutral: Maintained 28-second deficit without probing, suggesting INEOS waiting for higher altitude tests
